_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about the connections between people and the places and environments they live in.

_source.w: We are learning about the connections between people and the places and environments they live in.
y: Understanding our connection to the environment helps us see how it supports our lives.
People depend on the places they live in for food, water, shelter, and wellbeing.
Learning about this relationship helps us become more thoughtful about how we treat our surroundings.
eg: Discussing how our local environment gives us clean air, water, and food.
Exploring how plants and trees in our area support both people and animals.
Comparing how people in the city and people in the country depend on their environments differently.
Talking about how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples have cared for Country for thousands of years.
Identifying ways people change their environment, like building roads or planting gardens.
Discussing what happens when people take too much from the environment without giving back.
